title: Grant the no-card trial on the annual first-time checkout path

tasks.title: Widen annual checkout result type to allow the trial effect
tasks.description: In apps/api/src/services/subscription-checkout.service.ts, widen InitiatePaidAnnualSubscriptionResult / CheckoutAppliedEffect so the annual initiator can return appliedEffect: 'trial' plus an optional promoCodeIgnored flag (monthly already does this). Pure type change, no runtime branch yet. Unit test: none new (compile-only); the annual branch tests in T-009 assert the new shape.

subtasks.title: Add 'trial' to the annual result's appliedEffect union
Add optional promoCodeIgnored to the annual result type

tasks.title: Add the trial-eligibility branch to initiatePaidAnnualSubscription
tasks.description: Insert the trial branch into initiatePaidAnnualSubscription AFTER the COMP early-return and BEFORE the discount/upfront-charge path, mirroring initiatePaidMonthlySubscription (~L541-635): resolvePlanTrialConfig(plan.metadata) -> if plan declares a trial AND customer has zero prior subs -> trialService.startTrial() -> early return { appliedEffect: 'trial', localSubscriptionId, expiresAt, checkoutUrl: urls.successUrl (in-app sentinel), promoCodeIgnored when a discount code was dropped }. On startTrial() null (became ineligible), fall through to the unchanged annual paid path. Do NOT pass any interval (trial object is interval-agnostic). Unit tests in T-009. Spec AC-1/AC-2.

subtasks.title: Resolve plan trial config + zero-prior-subs eligibility check
Call trialService.startTrial() and early-return the trial shape
Fall through to the paid annual path on null (ineligible)

tasks.title: Persist intendedInterval on the trial subscription metadata (both paths)
tasks.description: Thread intendedInterval ('monthly' | 'annual') into TrialService.startTrial() and stamp it into the trial subscription's metadata: 'annual' from the annual branch (T-002), 'monthly' from the existing monthly branch. Metadata-only write on the row startTrial already creates; no schema change, no migration. This is the OQ-1 source of truth and the analytics dimension. Unit test in T-010. Spec AC-8, Design section 5.

subtasks.title: Add intendedInterval to StartTrialInput and stamp into metadata

tasks.title: Append ?interval to the TRIAL_EXPIRED notification upgradeUrl
tasks.description: In blockExpiredTrials() (apps/api/src/services/trial.service.ts), read intendedInterval from the expiring trial's metadata and append ?interval=<intendedInterval> to the existing upgradeUrl on the TRIAL_EXPIRED notification (nudge delivery path 1). Default gracefully when metadata lacks it. Unit test: notification payload carries the correct interval query param. Spec Design section 5, AC-9.

subtasks.title: Read intendedInterval from trial metadata in blockExpiredTrials
Append ?interval= to upgradeUrl with a safe default

tasks.title: Web: show the trial copy under the annual toggle
tasks.description: In apps/web/src/components/billing/PricingCardsGrid.astro, rename the trial line class off the interval-specific .pricing-card__trial--monthly to an interval-neutral class and drop it from the [data-billing='annual'] display:none rule (~L667-671) so 'N dias gratis' shows under BOTH monthly and annual toggles. Copy itself is interval-agnostic. Web test in T-013. Spec Design section 4, AC-6.

subtasks.title: Remove it from the annual hide rule

tasks.title: Web: pre-select the toggle from the ?interval query param
tasks.description: In PricingCardsGrid.astro, read the ?interval= query param on load and set the initial data-billing on the .pricing-cards__container accordingly (nudge). A user manually flipping the toggle is never overridden; the query param wins over the monthly default. Same file as T-005 (sequence to avoid conflict). Web test in T-013. Spec Design section 5, AC-9.

subtasks.title: Set initial data-billing from it, default monthly

tasks.title: i18n: confirm/adjust interval-neutral trial copy (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Review the pricing.trial string in packages/i18n for es/en/pt. Since the trial now shows on the annual toggle too, ensure the wording does not imply monthly-only. If already neutral ('N dias gratis' / '{days}-day free trial'), no change beyond confirming. Only edit if a locale implies monthly. Spec Design section 4.

subtasks.title: Audit pricing.trial in es/en/pt for monthly-implying wording

tasks.title: Fast-follow: expose intendedInterval on the trial-status surface
tasks.description: OPTIONAL (secondary nudge path per spec). Extend the existing trial-status endpoint + its web consumer to return the logged-in user's most recent trial intendedInterval, so direct navigation (no query param) also pre-selects the toggle. Path 1 (T-004/T-006) is the must-have; this may ship as a fast-follow. Unit test: endpoint returns intendedInterval. Spec Design section 5 (path 2).

subtasks.title: Return intendedInterval from the trial-status surface
Web: fall back to it when no ?interval= is present

tasks.title: Unit tests: annual trial branch (eligibility + promo precedence)
tasks.description: Cover AC-1 (eligible + annual -> trialing via startTrial, NO MP object, no charge, appliedEffect='trial'), AC-2 (not-eligible + annual -> unchanged upfront MP checkout, never 'trial'), AC-5 (promo precedence: comp wins/no trial, trial_extension adds days, discount discarded with promoCodeIgnored), AC-7 (cross-interval: consumed monthly trial -> not eligible for annual). Test file alongside the existing monthly checkout service tests. TDD: assert the T-002 branch behavior.

subtasks.title: AC-1 eligible annual -> trial, no MP object

tasks.title: Unit test: intendedInterval stamped on both paths
tasks.description: Assert a trial started from the annual branch records metadata.intendedInterval='annual' and a trial started from the monthly branch records 'monthly' (AC-8). Test alongside trial/checkout service tests.

tasks.title: Integration test: annual trial via /start-paid + cancel-only expiry
tasks.description: Cover AC-1 end-to-end (POST /start-paid billingInterval='annual' as trial-eligible -> trialing sub, no MP object created, correct response) and AC-3 (blockExpiredTrials cancels an annual-originated trialing sub past trialEnd with no charge, writes TRIAL_BLOCKED + trial_converted_at, sends TRIAL_EXPIRED). Uses the MP stub. Integration test file under apps/api/test.

subtasks.title: AC-3 expiry cron cancels annual trial (no charge)

tasks.title: Test: analytics reuses checkout_started for annual -> trial
tasks.description: Assert the checkout_started analytics event for a trial-eligible annual start carries billingInterval='annual' AND appliedEffect='trial', and that NO new analytics event/property is introduced (AC-10, OQ-2). Wherever checkout analytics are emitted/asserted.

tasks.title: Web test: annual toggle shows trial copy + ?interval pre-select
tasks.description: Cover AC-6 (trial copy visible under both monthly and annual toggle, not display:none) and AC-9 (opening with ?interval=annual pre-selects data-billing='annual'; manual flip not overridden). Component/DOM test for PricingCardsGrid.astro behavior.

subtasks.title: AC-6 trial copy visible on annual

tasks.title: Docs + closeout: annual trial branch
tasks.description: Update the billing endpoint-gate-matrix / trial-system docs to note the annual entry path now grants the no-card trial, and record intendedInterval metadata. Add status-needs-smoke-staging label at PR time (billing checkout surface, real MP sandbox). Fill closeout.md. No prod smoke needed (no CORE money mutation). Spec Smoke labels section.
